author: Abhishek Gahlot
name: Int6 Mixed Quant + MLP 3x + STE QAT + NorMuon + Sliding Window
blurb: Mixed int6/int8 quantization with STE fake-int6 QAT, 3x MLP expansion (21.8M params), NorMuon optimizer, SWA checkpoint averaging, sliding window eval (stride=64), seq_len=2048, batch=786K, Muon momentum=0.99, zstd-22.
